rationale.root_cause: They identified that data is freed at line ~32 and then freed again at line ~34 in CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad(), explaining the double-free mechanism. This directly names the flawed site and describes the two frees on the same pointer.
rationale.local_fix: They explicitly recommend removing the second free or setting data = NULL immediately after the first free. This matches the required local fix.
rationale.global_fix: They suggested setting pointers to NULL and using static analysis, but did not propose a single-owner cleanup pattern with one responsible free site.
